creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=8f39b8864f37aae5ac1e10430d5af560fd664e97

commit 8f39b8864f37aae5ac1e10430d5af560fd664e97
Author:     Dave Cottlehuber <dch@freebsd.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-12-29 06:44:05 +0000
Commit:     Yuri Victorovich <yuri@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-12-29 06:49:44 +0000

    net/goreplay: Update 1.2.0 -> 1.3.2

    Can't update to 1.3.3 or 2.x-rcx because 1.3.3 is missing the
    v prefix and Golang servers don't read such versions, and
    2.x requires the /v2 suffix in the module name which is missing.

    PR:             265780
    Approved by:    swills@ (maintainer's timeout; 4 months 17 days)

 net/goreplay/Makefile                        | 33 +--------------
 net/goreplay/distinfo                        | 60 +++-------------------------
 net/goreplay/files/patch-size_size.go (gone) | 11 -----
 3 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 97 deletions(-)
